title: Loova AI | AI Image & Video Generator | All-in-One Creative Playground
excerpt: Loova gives creators access to top AI models like VEO 3.1, Sora 2 Pro and Kling O1 in one platform, with text-to-video, image-to-video, and viral effects to boost creativity.
content_html:
AI UGC Ad Maker

Bringyour Productinto Video Ads

Upload a product, pick a style, add an avatar, and create ready-to-use ads.

150

Choose an Ad Template for Your Product

Introduction

What Is Loova's AI UGC Ad Maker?

Loova's AI UGC Ad Maker helps brands create authentic AI UGC ads without filming or hiring creators. Upload your product or paste a product URL, choose an AI avatar, add your key message, and generate ready-to-publish UGC ads with realistic voiceovers and social-first storytelling in minutes.

Steps

How to Use the AI UGC Video Generator

1

Upload Your Product or Product Link

Upload product images or simply paste a product URL from Shopify, Amazon, Shopee, TikTok Shop, or your own website.

2

Choose an AI Avatar or Create Your Own

Select from realistic AI UGC creators or build a custom AI spokesperson that matches your brand identity.

3

Select Hook & Describe Your Ad

Write your hook, selling points, or call to action, and Loova will generate a complete AI UGC video that's ready to publish.

Highlights

Why Choose Loova AI UGC Ad Maker?

Turn Any Product or URL into a UGC Ad

Transform product images or product pages into engaging AI UGC videos automatically. Loova extracts product information, visuals, and selling points to create conversion-focused ads in minutes.

Realistic AI UGC Creators

Choose from a growing library of natural-looking AI actors with realistic facial expressions, lip sync, and voiceovers that feel authentic on every social platform.

Create Your Own AI UGC Creator

Build a custom AI avatar based on your brand, spokesperson, or creator. Reuse the same AI actor across campaigns to maintain a consistent brand identity.

Ready-to-Convert Ads
for Under $2

Create professional AI UGC ads at a fraction of traditional production costs. Launch campaigns faster while keeping creative expenses low.

Generate More Winning Creatives Faster

Produce dozens of ad variations from a single product. Test different hooks, scripts, avatars, voiceovers, and styles to quickly identify your highest-performing campaigns.

Use Cases

AI UGC Ad Maker Use Cases

Publish Across Every Channel

Facebook Ads

Generate AI UGC ads optimized for Facebook feeds, Reels, and paid campaigns.

Instagram Ads

Create engaging Stories, Reels, and feed ads designed to increase reach and conversions.

YouTube Ads

Produce product demos, testimonials, and short-form commercials with realistic AI presenters.

TikTok Ads

Generate creator-style vertical videos designed for organic engagement and paid advertising.

Pinterest Ads

Create lifestyle-focused UGC videos and product promotions that inspire discovery and clicks.

LinkedIn Ads

Produce professional product videos and B2B campaigns for business audiences.

Show All

What is an AI UGC Ad Maker?

How does the AI UGC video generator work?

Can I create AI UGC ads without hiring influencers?

Can I create my own AI UGC creator?

Can I generate multiple UGC ads for A/B testing?

Which platforms are supported?

Can I use AI UGC ads for commercial use?

Create AI UGC Ads That Drive More Sales

Turn your products into authentic, high-converting AI UGC videos in minutes with Loova.

content_html_zh:
AI UGC 广告制作者

将您的产品融入视频广告中

上传产品、选择样式、添加头像并创建即用型广告。

150

为您的产品选择广告模板

介绍

Loova的AI UGC广告制作工具是什么？

Loova的AI UGC Ad Maker帮助品牌制作真实的AI UGC广告，无需拍摄或聘请创作者。 上传您的产品或粘贴产品 URL、选择 AI 头像、添加您的关键信息，并在几分钟内生成具有逼真画外音和社交优先故事讲述的可立即发布的 UGC 广告。

Steps

如何使用AI UGC视频生成器

1

上传您的产品或产品链接

上传产品图片或直接粘贴来自 Shopify、Amazon、Shopee、TikTok Shop 或您自己的网站的产品 URL。

2

选择人工智能头像或创建您自己的人工智能头像

从现实的 AI UGC 创作者中进行选择，或构建与您的品牌形象相匹配的自定义 AI 代言人。

3

选择“挂钩并描述您的广告”

写下您的亮点、卖点或号召性用语，Loova 将生成完整的 AI UGC 视频，可供发布。

亮点

为什么选择Loova AI UGC广告制作工具？

将任何产品或 URL 变成 UGC 广告

自动将产品图片或产品页面转换为引人入胜的 AI UGC 视频。 Loova 提取产品信息、视觉效果和卖点，在几分钟内创建以转化为重点的广告。

现实的人工智能 UGC 创作者

从不断增长的自然 AI 演员库中进行选择，这些演员具有逼真的面部表情、口型同步和配音，在每个社交平台上都感觉真实。

创建您自己的 AI UGC 创作者

根据您的品牌、代言人或创作者构建自定义 AI 头像。 在不同的营销活动中重复使用相同的人工智能角色，以保持一致的品牌形象。

成本低于 2 美元即可转化的广告

以传统制作成本的一小部分创建专业的人工智能 UGC 广告。 更快地启动营销活动，同时保持较低的创意费用。

更快地产生更多获胜创意

从单一产品制作数十种广告变体。 测试不同的挂钩、脚本、头像、画外音和风格，以快速识别效果最好的营销活动。

使用案例

AI UGC 广告制作工具用例

通过各个渠道发布

脸书广告

生成针对 Facebook feed、Reels 和付费活动进行优化的 AI UGC 广告。

Instagram 广告

创建引人入胜的故事、卷轴和信息流广告，旨在提高覆盖面和转化率。

YouTube 广告

与逼真的 AI 演示者一起制作产品演示、推荐和短片广告。

抖音广告

生成专为有机参与和付费广告而设计的创作者风格的垂直视频。

Pinterest 广告

创建以生活方式为中心的 UGC 视频和产品促销，以激发发现和点击。

领英广告

为商业受众制作专业的产品视频和 B2B 活动。
